author: Expunge
text:
bl init safety: adopt a configured state_remote; never clobber a shared branch

A reachable hub is adopted (bl-c0c6 wiring); an unaware clone with no matching git remote gets a usable isolated local store plus an advisory pointing at bl remaster — never a destructive surprise. Init only tracks-or-creates and does plain non-force pushes; a non-empty/divergent shared branch rejects the push as a no-op. Init never resets/force-pushes/overwrites. Tests cover adopt-silent, unaware-advised, non-clobber-under-divergence, unset==today. 100% coverage.
